stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
On the display device of the TCAS 2 (Traffic Collision Avoidance System), you see a solid cyan square. This means…

options.a: Proximate traffic, within 6 NM and 1200 ft vertically.
options.b: Traffic alert within 35-45 seconds from the first encounter with the traffic.
options.d: Other traffic, within 6 NM and 1200 ft vertically.
